Summary: TC09 - Exact product keyword returns correct first result
Description: Verify that searching with an exact product keyword "มาชิตะสาหร่ายเกาหลีรสต้มยำ4กx6" returns HTTP 200, has at least 1 item, and the first result's name (from metadata service) matches the keyword after normalization (remove spaces/dots)
Action: Call GET /api/v1/universal/text_search with search_keyword=""มาชิตะสาหร่ายเกาหลีรสต้มยำ4กx6"" and type=""711-ecommerce""
Data: keyword="มาชิตะสาหร่ายเกาหลีรสต้มยำ4กx6", type="711-ecommerce", limit=100
Expected Result: HTTP 200; items > 0; first item id looked up via POST /metadata/all-view-data; name field (normalized: strip spaces and dots) contains "มาชิตะสาหร่ายเกาหลีรสต้มยำ4กx6"

Summary: TC12 - Candidate ordering matches Baseline ordering
Description: Verify that the top-100 item IDs and their ordering from CANDIDATE (ai-universal-service-new GET /text_search) match BASELINE (ai-raas-api POST /text_search) for keyword "มาชิตะสาหร่ายเกาหลีรสต้มยำ4กx6"
Action: 1. Call POST BASELINE_URL with search_keyword="มาชิตะสาหร่ายเกาหลีรสต้มยำ4กx6" and Authorization header; 2. Call GET CANDIDATE_URL with same keyword; 3. Compare top-100 IDs and order
Data: keyword="มาชิตะสาหร่ายเกาหลีรสต้มยำ4กx6", type="711-ecommerce"; Baseline: POST with Authorization header; Candidate: GET with userId/pseudoId/ssoId params
Expected Result: Both return HTTP 200; baseline items > 0; candidate items > 0; top-100 item IDs are identical and in the same order
